name: Telepathy
description: Telegram OSINT analysis Tool: https://pypi.org/project/telepathy/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #750 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Telepathy output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Telepathy output file to parse instead of running it live.
